metadata.description: Challenges validating metrics collection, performance baselines, memory tracking, cache monitoring, and error rate observability

challenges.name: Metrics Collection Accuracy
challenges.description: Verify that ParserRegistry instantiation counts, lazy-loading statistics, and parse timing metrics are collected accurately. After registering parsers lazily and accessing a subset, getInstantiatedParserCount() and getPendingParserCount() must reflect the exact state.

outputs.name: instantiated_count
outputs.description: Number of parsers that have been instantiated

outputs.name: pending_count
outputs.description: Number of parsers still pending (lazy, not yet accessed)

outputs.name: counts_match_expected
outputs.description: Whether instantiated + pending equals total registered

outputs.name: initialization_status
outputs.description: Per-format initialization status map

assertions.message: Instantiated + pending must equal total registered parsers
Initialization status map must be populated
At least one parser must be instantiated after access

challenges.name: Performance Baseline Validation
challenges.description: Establish and validate performance baselines for all 17 format parsers. Each parser must parse a representative document within a defined time budget. Measure parse time, HTML generation time, and total pipeline time for each format.

outputs.name: baseline_results
outputs.description: Parse and HTML generation times per format

outputs.name: formats_within_budget
outputs.description: Number of formats within their time budget

outputs.name: slowest_format
outputs.description: Format with the longest total pipeline time

outputs.name: fastest_format
outputs.description: Format with the shortest total pipeline time

assertions.message: Baseline results must be collected for all formats
At least 80% of formats must be within their time budget

challenges.name: Memory Usage Tracking
challenges.description: Track memory usage during document parsing and HTML generation. Parse 1000 documents of varying sizes, measure memory before and after, and verify that memory is reclaimed after clearing HTML caches via clearHtmlCache().

outputs.name: memory_before_bytes
outputs.description: Heap memory usage before parsing

outputs.name: memory_after_parse_bytes
outputs.description: Heap memory usage after parsing all documents

outputs.name: memory_after_html_bytes
outputs.description: Heap memory usage after HTML generation

outputs.name: memory_after_clear_bytes
outputs.description: Heap memory usage after clearing HTML caches

outputs.name: cache_cleared_successfully
outputs.description: Whether clearHtmlCache reduced memory usage

assertions.message: Initial memory measurement must be recorded
Post-parse memory measurement must be recorded
Clearing HTML cache must reduce memory usage

challenges.name: Cache Hit Rate Monitoring
challenges.description: Verify that ParsedDocument HTML caching achieves expected hit rates. After the first toHtml() call, subsequent calls must return cached HTML. Measure cache hit rate across 1000 toHtml() calls on 100 documents with mixed light/dark modes.

outputs.name: total_calls
outputs.description: Total number of toHtml() calls made

outputs.name: cache_hits
outputs.description: Number of calls that returned cached HTML

outputs.name: cache_misses
outputs.description: Number of calls that generated new HTML (first call per mode)

outputs.name: hit_rate_percent
outputs.description: Cache hit rate as a percentage

assertions.message: Cache hit rate must be at least 75% (each doc has 2 misses: light + dark)
At least 500 cache hits expected for 1000 calls on 100 documents
Total call count must be recorded

challenges.name: Error Rate Monitoring
challenges.description: Verify that parse errors are correctly tracked and reported. Feed a mix of valid and intentionally malformed documents to all parsers and verify that error counts match expectations. Validate that ParsedDocument.errors accurately reflects all parse issues.

outputs.name: total_documents_processed
outputs.description: Total number of documents processed

outputs.name: documents_with_errors
outputs.description: Number of documents that produced parse errors

outputs.name: total_errors
outputs.description: Total number of individual parse errors across all documents

outputs.name: error_rate_percent
outputs.description: Percentage of documents with at least one error

outputs.name: errors_by_format
outputs.description: Error count broken down by format

assertions.message: Error breakdown by format must be collected
Error count must be a non-negative number
